channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dumped mattress, 13th March
item.description:
Someone has dumped a mattress near the junction of Mornington Avenue and Homesdale Road. It has been there for 2 days
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mornington Avenue, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish, 13th March
item.description:
Clothing drying frame and something else left against fence. Pls remove.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 80, Westmoreland Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cones on road, 13th March
item.description:
There are cones on the road which aren't police cones. I think they need to be removed by the council

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Denbridge Road, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead tree, 13th March
item.description:
Ref 7443684 108 kynaston road br5 4jz . Reported dead tree April 2025 They said it would be replaced before end of March 2026 It hasn’t yet been replaced. Kind regards C Moakes

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 82, Kynaston Road, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement is cracked and unstable, 13th March
item.description:
The pavement is cracked, unstable and a trip hazard. This is very close to the Argos entrance and in a separate place close to the junction with Electric Lane. It is a trip hazard and the slabs need replacing.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Atlantic Road, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog poo 💩 left in ermine side block 1 to 12, 13th March
item.description:
This dog poo 💩 💩💩 was left by someone last night out side of the bin room in ermine side block 1 to 12 when can someone come and clear it up please as dog poo has bacteria in it that is dangerous to children so this needs to be cleared up asp please 🙏

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ermine Side, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish and recycling voer the street, 13th March
item.description:
This ALWAYS happens when the binmen come as they empty one bin into another spilling it everywhere

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Felsberg Road, Streatham Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Felsberg Road, Streatham Hill, Greater London

item.title: Young tree blown down in wind, outside 38 May Avenue. Not causing H&S issue., 13th March
item.description:
Please remove damaged tree.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 26, May Avenue, Poverest, Greater London

item.title: Fly tipping, 13th March
item.description:
Three black rubbish bags dumped outside 3 Rectory Lane, Sidcup, is DA14 4QN for over a week. Could cause a trip hazard

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rectory Lane, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocking driveway, 13th March
item.description:
I live near Kenningtons Primary School and every day I have people parking across my driveway on school pick up and drop off times. Today I had an appointment that I was late for due to inconsiderate parking. Please consider parking permits for residents or parking officers. I have complained to the school but they are unable to do anything. It’s becoming worse and is solely due to parents wanting to drop off/pick up their children. I have been verbally abused when asking people not to park across my drive but as you can see from the picture, I literally cannot get off my driveway

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tamar Drive
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Christmas Tree blockkng pavement, 13th March
item.description:
There is a christmas tree and other rubbish on the pavement because of the high winds.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albert Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
